pkgmetadata.longdescription: Cppy.. image httpsgithub.comnucleiccppyactionsworkflowsci.ymlbadge.svg target httpsgithub.comnucleiccppyactionsworkflowsci.ymlA small C++ header library which makes it easier to write Python extensionmodules. The primary feature is a PyObject smart pointer which automaticallyhandles reference counting and provides convenience methods for performingcommon object operations.
